info.title: my-buddy API
info.description: Personal skill-building project companion. Phase 0 scaffold: the API contract is frozen; endpoint bodies are stubs (501) except /health. Contract of record: shared/project-spec.schema.json + this OpenAPI surface (see COORDINATION.md §6).

post.summary: Import a spec (validates, persists, runs shop diff §8)

patch.summary: Toggle a tool's checked / owned state
Toggle a step's completed state / set its note

schema.title: Response List Inventory Shop Inventory Get

post.summary: Add a tool to My Shop

delete.summary: Remove a tool from My Shop

post.summary: Upload a progress photo (multipart; optional step_id)

schema.title: Response List Photos Projects  Project Id  Photos Get

post.summary: Start a generation session from the setup payload (mock 1d)
Send one user turn, get the agent's reply (mock 1e)

schema.title: Response Send Message Generate Sessions  Session Id  Messages Post

post.summary: Emit the full §6 spec as strict JSON (mock 1e → 1f)
Re-populate research resources[] via web search (§7.2)

schema.title: Response Refresh Research Projects  Project Id  Research Refresh Post

BudgetBand.title: BudgetBand
BudgetBand.description:
Generation setup budget band (§7.1 / mock 1d): Under $30 / $30–75 / $75+.

NOTE (judgment call — confirm before forking): the docs give display labels,
not wire tokens. These machine values are inferred.

id.title: Id
id.description: Stable within the session; used to select this candidate.

Candidate.title: Candidate
Candidate.description:
A proposed candidate project for vague/'surprise me' input (§7.1). The
``id`` is stable within the session and is echoed back via
``GenerateMessageCreate.select_candidate_id`` to pick it.

message_id.title: Message Id
message_id.description: Stable id for this agent turn; dedupe on retry.

ClarifyTurn.title: ClarifyTurn
ClarifyTurn.description: Agent asked a clarifying question — awaiting a free-text answer.

select_candidate_id.title: Select Candidate Id
select_candidate_id.description: Accept a proposed candidate by its id (from a ProposeTurn).

GenerateMessageCreate.title: GenerateMessageCreate
GenerateMessageCreate.description:
§11 POST /generate/sessions/{id}/messages — one user turn.

Conversation state lives server-side keyed by session_id (§7.1), so a turn is
tiny: EITHER a free-text reply OR selecting a previously proposed candidate
(by its ``Candidate.id``). Exactly one of the two must be set.

total.title: Total
total.description: Agent may not always know the total up front.

GenerateProgress.title: GenerateProgress
GenerateProgress.description: Rough progress sense for the bounded chat (§7.1: 'Design step · 3 of 5').

description.title: Description
description.description: Short free-text description (or the idea chip) of what to build.

checked.title: Checked
checked.description: Runtime: toggled from the shopping cart.

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: One-paragraph description of the finished piece and what you'll learn.

ProjectRead.title: ProjectRead
ProjectRead.description:
Full hydrated project (§11 GET /projects/{id}): spec + state + research +
photos + retrospective.

schema_version.title: Schema Version
schema_version.description: Spec schema version. Required and pinned; versioned from day one.

ProjectSpec.title: ProjectSpec
ProjectSpec.description:
The full project spec (§6). This is the request body for the import path
(``POST /projects``) and the response body for generation finalize
(``POST /generate/sessions/{id}/finalize``).

ProjectSummary.title: ProjectSummary
ProjectSummary.description:
List view (§11 GET /projects → the 1a 'Your projects' grid). Row-level
fields only; no hydrated children.

message_id.title: Message Id
message_id.description: Stable id for this agent turn; dedupe on retry.

ProposeTurn.title: ProposeTurn
ProposeTurn.description: Agent proposed 2–3 candidate projects — awaiting a pick (§7.1, capped at 3).

message_id.title: Message Id
message_id.description: Stable id for this agent turn; dedupe on retry.

ReadyTurn.title: ReadyTurn
ReadyTurn.description: Agent has enough ('✓ Ready to generate documents') — client may call finalize.

resources.title: Resources
resources.description: May arrive empty from generation; the research web-search pass (§7.2) fills them.

SkillLevel.title: SkillLevel
SkillLevel.description: Generation setup skill level (§7.1 / mock 1d). Mirrors spec difficulty.

instruction.title: Instruction
instruction.description: Detailed novice-level instruction. Assume no prior knowledge.

note.title: Note
note.description: Runtime: per-step learning ('where I got stuck').

owned.title: Owned
owned.description: Runtime: set by the shop diff (§8).

acquire.title: Acquire
acquire.description: Runtime: set by the shop diff (§8).
